---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AutoDataForge
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Architecture fit

How does this fit the "agents orchestrate, backend stays frozen" model? Is it a new
dataset source (above the pipeline), a read-only intelligence surface (beside it), or
a new tool/adapter?

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
